title: RGB color image
description: A single RGB color frame, optionally with camera intrinsics. Produced by a camera source (e.g. RealSenseDocker) and consumed by mask/status models. Channel order is RGB system-wide.

intrinsics.description: Color camera intrinsic matrix K (3x3, row-major).

encoding.description: Channel order of the color array. RGB is the system-wide standard; BGR is no longer used.
